description: Hardware monitoring and AI backend status.

commands.get_backend_status: Verifies if the AI backend (Ollama, Kobold, or Cloud) is online and ready.
commands.get_full_dashboard: Returns a complete report of all hardware resources and AI backend status.
commands.get_gpu_status: Returns the video card (GPU) status, including VRAM usage and thermal/computational load.
commands.get_system_resources: Returns a summary of system CPU and RAM usage.

function.name: DASHBOARD__get_backend_status
function.description: Verifies if the AI backend (Ollama, Kobold, or Cloud) is online and ready.

function.name: DASHBOARD__get_full_dashboard
function.description: Returns a complete report of all hardware resources and AI backend status.

function.name: DASHBOARD__get_gpu_status
function.description: Returns the video card (GPU) status, including VRAM usage and thermal/computational load.

function.name: DASHBOARD__get_system_resources
function.description: Returns a summary of system CPU and RAM usage.
